markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Intro call to vet Fernando Diaz for a video editing role.](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**GrowthX is rebooting its video strategy** to boost YouTube retention with modern, algorithm-friendly edits, replacing a previous editor whose style was deemed "crispy."](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [**Fernando Diaz's reel impressed Will Proctor** with its strong hooks and modern style; his workflow uses Premiere Pro, After Effects, and AI (ChatGPT) for efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)
  - [**A 1-video test project is planned** to assess fit. Fernando will bid on a 5–7 min "retention edit" after reviewing sample videos from Will.](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [**Jesus Yepez will create a shared Slack channel** to centralize communication and connect Will, Fernando, and Jason (VP of Growth).](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Video Strategy Reboot

  - [GrowthX is overhauling its video strategy to increase YouTube retention.](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [**Goal:** Modernize style and streamline production pipelines.](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [**Problem:** The previous editor's style was "crispy" (outdated), necessitating a change.](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [**New Focus:**](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
      - [Strong hooks in the first 30 seconds.](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
      - [Polished packaging (titles, thumbnails).](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
      - [Retention edits (on-screen text, zooms) to maintain engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)

### Fernando Diaz's Workflow & Capabilities

  - [Fernando's reel demonstrated a modern style with effective cold opens.](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)
  - [**Tool Stack:**](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
      - [**Premiere Pro:** Montage and captions.](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
      - [**After Effects:** Motion graphics (zooms, text).](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [**AI Integration:** Uses ChatGPT with transcripts to generate timecodes for hooks and shorts, significantly speeding up the editing process.](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)

### Proposed Test Project

  - [A 1-video test project will assess fit before any larger commitment.](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [**Scope:** One 5–7 minute video requiring a full "retention edit."](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
    1.  [Will sends sample videos to define the required style.](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
    2.  [Fernando submits a bid for an equivalent video.](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
    3.  [Will presents the bid to Jason (VP of Growth) for approval.](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
  - [**Future Potential:** If successful, the partnership could expand to include shorts and a higher volume of videos.](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Will Proctor:** Send sample videos to Fernando Diaz.](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
  - [**Fernando Diaz:** Review samples and submit a bid for the test video.](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
  - [**Jesus Yepez:** Create a shared Slack channel for Will, Fernando, and Jason.](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
